title: Future Careers and English
description: Take your dream job to the world with English!

scenes.speech: What's your dream job? With English, the stage is the whole world! 🌍
scenes.title: Dream Jobs and English
scenes.content: This lesson is about future careers and English. English lets you find your dream job worldwide. Connect the job and the language together.

scenes.title: Programmer
scenes.content: Programming languages, libraries, error messages, docs — most are in English. Knowing English deepens your code one extra level.
scenes.highlight:
Programming = global job
Docs are mostly in English

scenes.title: Creator
scenes.content: Illustration, video, music. Writing English captions or comments brings your work to people across the world.
scenes.highlight:
Artist / YouTuber / Musician
→ Reach the world

scenes.speech: Researchers and scientists also need English!
scenes.title: Researcher
scenes.content: Papers, conferences, international collaborations. To work and learn with researchers worldwide, English is non-negotiable.
scenes.highlight:
Research = global team
Papers in English

scenes.speech: Founders can challenge the global market!
scenes.title: Entrepreneur
scenes.content: If you want to deliver your service to the world, design with English in mind from day one. Your market grows 10x.

scenes.speech: Healthcare and welfare need English too!
scenes.title: Healthcare and Welfare
scenes.content: Global health, overseas volunteering, research. With English, the number of people you can help multiplies.
scenes.highlight:
Doctor / Nurse / Aid worker
→ Help more people

scenes.speech: Education and translation are stars of the future!
scenes.title: Education / Translation
scenes.content: International school teachers, interpreters, AI translation specialists. Bridge-the-language jobs are in growing demand.

scenes.speech: It's an era when 'what you love' becomes a job!
scenes.title: Turn Hobby into Work
scenes.content: Game streamers, social media creators, esports players. New professions keep being born from hobbies. English widens the circle.

scenes.speech: Check the basics of interview English!
scenes.title: Interview English
scenes.content: Tell me about yourself. Why do you want this job? What's your strength? Self-intro + reason + strength — prepare these three to apply anywhere.
scenes.highlight:
1. Tell me about yourself
2. Why this job?
3. Your strength?

scenes.speech: Quiz! How do you say 'Tell me about yourself' for an interview?
scenes.quizQuestion: Which is the standard interview opener in English?
scenes.quizExplanation: Tell me about yourself. is the classic first question in interviews.

scenes.speech: Take your dream worldwide! Your English builds the future! 🌟
scenes.title: Series Complete!
